metadata.description: Agent skills distilled from real-world usage: codex-implementation-loop — delegate implementation to Codex while keeping review, test-gating, and shipping judgment in Claude's hands; web-slides — click-driven 16:9 HTML slide decks with a presenter view for live presenting.

plugins.name: codex-implementation-loop
plugins.description: A review-gated implementation loop: dispatch coding units to Codex (codex-companion runtime), review the diff, iterate on the same thread, gate on the full test suite, then ship as a PR. Encodes hard-won environment constraints (read-only git, no full-suite runs, stuck-job handling) and seven user-configurable dials.

plugins.name: web-slides
plugins.description: Turn material, outlines, or talking points into click-driven 16:9 HTML slide decks for live presenting — cinematic, anti-AI aesthetic, 24 built-in themes, per-step speaker notes, and a presenter view (press P: speaker notes + live slide preview + timer in a separate window, synced via BroadcastChannel — share only the slide window to hide notes from the audience). Ships a Vite + React + TypeScript scaffold. Derived from ConardLi's garden-skills (MIT).
